Off Calendar Feb-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs ANDY HUYNH and THEM KY RESTAURANT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses:

Motion granted in part; denied in part. Granted as to Form Interrogatories 2.1, 2.2, 2.5, 12.1, 50.2. Denied as to 2.6, 2.7, 7.1, 12.4, 12.5, 12.6. Granted as to RFPD Nos. 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 10, 11, 12-26 (responses must state "all responsive non-privileged documents will be produced.") Any documents withheld on privilege or other grounds must be placed on a log. Denied as to RFPDs Nos. 7-9. Supplemental responses to be provided by February 24, 2021. Sanctions denied.

Moving party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to davididaho14@gmail.com.
